app.title: Mailbox
connect.title: Connect mail account
connect.help: Create a Desktop-app OAuth client in Google Cloud Console (APIs & Services → Credentials), enable the Gmail API, then paste the client ID and secret here. Google opens in your browser to ask for consent; the credentials are sealed in this vault's keystore.
connect.label: Account label
connect.waiting: Waiting for Google — finish signing in in your browser.
connect.imap.help: Enter your mail server details and your password. Some providers (Gmail, iCloud, Yahoo, Fastmail) reject account passwords over IMAP — generate an app-specific password on their security page and use that instead. The password is sealed in this vault's keystore; TLS is always required — the connection upgrades via STARTTLS on a non-TLS port.
sync.errorAuth: Sync failed: the mail server rejected the credentials. Check the username and app password (most providers require an app-specific password, not your account password), then reconnect the account.
cta.title: No mail account yet
cta.blurb: Connect a Google account or any IMAP/SMTP mailbox to sync mail into this vault.
account.removed: Account removed — mail already synced stays in the vault.
list.search.aria: Search mail by subject, sender, or text
list.empty.title: No messages
list.empty.blurb: Mail for this folder will appear here once it syncs.
list.empty.errorBlurb: The last sync failed — fix the account connection, then sync again.
sync.olderDone: Loaded older mail — {created} new. Every folder is fully loaded now.
sync.olderMore: Loaded older mail — {created} new. More history remains.
reading.empty.title: Select a message
reading.empty.blurb: Choose a message from the list to read it here.
compose.title: New message
compose.subject: Subject
body.remote.blocked: Remote images and content were blocked to protect your privacy.
body.empty: This message has no displayable content.
demo.banner: Preview data — connect a mail account to see real mail.
widget.title: Inbox
